name: Armada Acquisition Corp. I Unit
summary: Armada Acquisition Corp. I Unit consists of one share of common stock and a fraction of a warrant, allowing investors to potentially purchase additional shares in the future. It is offered as a package during the company's initial public offering (IPO) and separates into its component parts after a specified period. Armada Acquisition Corp. I is a SPAC, meaning its purpose is to acquire an existing private company.
